TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Si-ke-mung-defuo-luo-yi-deŤ•Ņś†ľŤíôŚĺ∑šĹõśīõšľäŚĺ∑, title = Si-ke-mung-defuo-luo-yi-deŤ•Ņś†ľŤíôŚĺ∑šĹõśīõšľäŚĺ∑, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Si-ke-mung-defuo-luo-yi-deŤ•Ņś†ľŤíôŚĺ∑šĹõśīõšľäŚĺ∑} }

S.FORM: Si-ke-mung-de.fuo-luo-yi-de (kamu nu Hulam: Ť•Ņś†ľŤíôŚĺ∑.šĹõśīõšľäŚĺ∑) nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ yumahidaśó©ŚĻī caywal-limnem mihcaan lima a bulad enem a demiad, pilacehan ni fuo-luo-yi-de itida i Aw-ti-li-ti-kuo-muo-la-wi-ya-Fuo-lay-paw a Yu-tay tademaw a lumaan, pilecuhan i Yu-tay a lumaan tu nikuda nipicudadan idaw ku satabakiay nu picuduhan. pilecuhan nina nida tulu ku tatamaan a wawaan atu lima ku tataynaan a wawaw, sakakaay nu tatamaan cinida, idaw hen ku caayay kalecad nu wamaan a wawaan. makelec ku nikaudip nu heni, adidi likecu ku luma', nika paicelan ku babalaki nu heni pahabay i tu nuhenian, micidek tu ci Fuo-luo-yi-dean. Nanuwawaw, micidek ku nipahabay tu tineng ci nidaan, tada micidek tu ku sapahabay ci nidaan mikikaka tu sapahabay tu calekakaan nida. 1856ŚĻī5śúą6śó•, . pilecuhan nida idaw ku mikabitay tu pilanuan tu udip nida, saan cina nida u malemeday ku mahiniay sa, yu wawa henay cinida mikikakatu tu salal a tineng, saiwaay henay ku mihcaan tada kapah tu ku nicudadan mikiayaw tu salal micudadtu tu cun-sea, picudadan tu waluay a mihcaan pinanaman matulin cinida enemay a mihcaan u sayaway a ku nipicudadan, micidek ku sakay laylayan tu udipan u sayaway tu makaala tu pitu a mihcaan ku tenes nida a kapah. . itawya amica idaw ku mihantayay nu Yu-tay a masakaputay, nika cinida i caywal-piclu mihcaan micumud tu Wi-ye-na tabakiay a cacudadan minanam tu nu nabakuan a kawawan. picudadan henay tu tabakiay a nipicuda Fuo-luo-yi-de, manamuh cinida tu sakay cilekayan atu sakay udipan a kawawan, sipayayaw nidaku sapinanam tu sakay aadupan atu sakay udipan a minanam, yadahtu ku nihapuan nida tu nicudadan. tawya u mikinkiway tu namakabalucuay a sayda nida ci Fuo-lan-ce. Pu-lun-ta-nuo, kasikadan nida kina babalaki. caywal-walcay a mihcaan lima a bulad, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de malaheci tu nida ku sakay misaydan a nipihedek micudad , maala nida ku Puo-se a nipicudadan. . hedek satu micudad, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de mitulin itini i Nsete'-pulike' a pikingkiwan tu sakay udipan misakakawaw. atu ci Masa.puonayse nikuda nu nipikungyakuan, mangalay micunus tu kalisiw, miala cinida tu nakamuan ni Puli-ke' alesen nida ku sapikingkiwan tu lilun a cudadan, malamisaydan cinida. caywal-waltu mihcaan pitu a bulad lucay a demiad, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de malingatu i Wiyena'-cunhe padekuan mikuli, katukuh i caywal-wallin a mihcaan walu a bulad mala Wuy-ye-na tabakiay nu cacudadan a nu sinkicuan a saydan. ÁēĘś•≠ŚĺĆ, . i tusip a mihcaan malalid mitabaku, saan mananam mitabaku taneng micuduh tu sakay kawawan sa. kaput nida ci Wi-lian.fuoli-se na tuduan tu ci nida, nika ci Fuo-luo-yi-de pakunida sa caay pitengil tu kamu nida, nikudan satu si imelang tu nu laway a nganang. anu hidan u nakamuan ni Fuo-luo-yi-de tu caywal-siwpic a mihcaan atu ci Fuo-li-se, malalid nu pitabakuan mahida u nipisulasulay sa. šĽĖŚú®24 . alesan nida ku sakasikadan a saydangan ci Fuo-lan-ce. Pu-lun-ta-nuo, kanamuhan nida ci Siaw-duo.Lipu-se atu ci Ni-cay a nisanga'an. nikapatayan ni Ni-cay tu caysiw-sepsep a mihcaan, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de u ni Ni-cay sa ku cakayen tu nisanga'an nida tu kawaw. nika i nikuda caay tu ka namuh tu kawaw ni Ni-cay, malingatu tu micudad tu sakay sinki a cudadan, namahida hina cudad cinida tu inggu nu cudadan ni Sase-piya, nikahida yadah ku namaka ci Sase-piya a cudadan ku yadahay nu nikiliman tu tatapangan nu sakay udipan a sapikinkiwan tu cudadan. . Kasinganganan śąźŚźć Caywal-walpic a nipikulitan tu Zeang-Matin.sake pisakamuan tu cudadan a waywayan, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de i pikawawan nida a kitidaan idaw ku nipiinsacuan nida tu Wiyena'- Fuo-luo-yi-de a nalumaan, aydaay nu Fuo-luo-yi-de puow-kuen. 30 537 Caywal-wallin a mihcaan caysep a bulad ci Fuo-luo-yi-de tayda i Pa-li pasayda ci Zeang-Matin.sake paayaawi kaku sa, sakamusa cinida tina kawawan, saan namaka udip tu pasaydan i nu sinkicuan mikinkiw idaw ku nikinkiwan tu kawawan sa. saka tusa a mihcaan sacacay satu ci nida mikinkiw, tawya pikinkiwan ni Fuo-luo-yi-de tada ba'ket tu, hina sepi, nika hinian nida namaka wamaan nida tu cawal- siwnem a mihcaan nikapatayan ni ama nida sisa hida satu malawacu. nai tawyaay tu a nikinkiwan, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de micuduh tu tademaw nu wawaan tu nisawacuan, tu nikudan satu mala nipacician tunusinkican atu kalaapaapaan a kawawan, u Fuo-luo-yi-de sapiala tu balucu han a cudadan. 1885ŚĻī10śúą, . caywal-walnem mihcaan, siacawa cinida ci Masa.-Puonay-se, a enem ku wawa nu heni. tuyniyan a mihcaan miales cinida tu sakay misaydan, i Wi-ye-na misiwbay tu padekuan. 1886ŚĻī, . malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: si-k…ô-muŇč-d…ô.fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ****.****) nikaudip** jumańßida** ¶ajwar~…ĺ-r~…ĺimn…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad, pir~…ĺa ¶…ôńßan ni fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô itida i aw-ti-r~…ĺi-ti-kuo-muo-r~…ĺa-wi-ja-fuo-r~…ĺaj-paw a ju-taj tad…ômaw a r~…ĺumaan, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ju-taj a r~…ĺumaan tu nikuda nipi ¶udadan idaw ku satabakiaj nu pi ¶uduńßan. pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nina nida tur~…ĺu ku tatamaan a wawaan atu r~…ĺima ku tatajnaan a wawaw, sakakaaj nu tatamaan ¶inida, idaw ńß…ôn ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu wamaan a wawaan. mak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ku nikaudip nu ńß…ôni, adidi r~…ĺik…ô ¶u ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nika pai ¶…ôr~…ĺan ku babar~…ĺaki nu ńß…ôni pańßabaj i tu nuńß…ônian, mi ¶id…ôk tu ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ôan. nanuwawaw, mi ¶id…ôk ku nipańßabaj tu tin…ôŇč ¶i nidaan, tada mi ¶id…ôk tu ku sapańßabaj ¶i nidaan mikikaka tu sapańßabaj tu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan nida. *********, . pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida idaw ku mikabitaj tu pir~…ĺanuan tu udip nida, saan ¶ina nida u mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ku mańßiniaj sa, ju wawa ńß…ônaj ¶inida mikikakatu tu sar~…ĺar~…ĺ a tin…ôŇč, saiwaaj ńß…ônaj ku mińß ¶aan tada kapańß tu ku ni ¶udadan mikiajaw tu sar~…ĺar~…ĺ mi ¶udadtu tu ¶un-s…ôa, pi ¶udadan tu war~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan pinanaman matur~…ĺin ¶inida …ôn…ômaj a mińß ¶aan u sajawaj a ku nipi ¶udadan, mi ¶id…ôk ku sakaj r~…ĺajr~…ĺajan tu udipan u sajawaj tu makaar~…ĺa tu pitu a mińß ¶aan ku t…ôn…ôs nida a kapańß. . itawja ami ¶a idaw ku mińßantajaj nu ju-taj a masakaputaj, nika ¶inida i ¶ajwar~…ĺ-pi ¶r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud tu wi-j…ô-na tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu nu nabakuan a kawawan. pi ¶udadan ńß…ônaj tu tabakiaj a nipi ¶uda fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô, manamuńß ¶inida tu sakaj ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan atu sakaj udipan a kawawan, sipajajaw nidaku sapinanam tu sakaj aadupan atu sakaj udipan a minanam, jadańßtu ku nińßapuan nida tu ni ¶udadan. tawja u mikinkiwaj tu namakabar~…ĺu ¶uaj a sajda nida ¶i fuo-r~…ĺan- ¶…ô. pu-r~…ĺun-ta-nuo, kasikadan nida kina babar~…ĺaki. ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺ ¶aj a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu nida ku sakaj misajdan a nipińß…ôd…ôk mi ¶udad , maar~…ĺa nida ku puo-s…ô a nipi ¶udadan. . ńß…ôd…ôk satu mi ¶udad, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô mitur~…ĺin itini i ns…ôt…ô Ē~ °-pur~…ĺik…ô Ē~ ° a pikiŇčkiwan tu sakaj udipan misakakawaw. atu ¶i masa.puonajs…ô nikuda nu nipikuŇčjakuan, maŇčar~…ĺaj mi ¶unus tu kar~…ĺisiw, miar~…ĺa ¶inida tu nakamuan ni pur~…ĺi-k…ô Ē~ ° ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn nida ku sapikiŇčkiwan tu r~…ĺir~…ĺun a ¶udadan, mar~…ĺamisajdan ¶inida. ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺtu mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad r~…ĺu ¶aj a d…ômiad, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu i wij…ôna Ē~ °- ¶unńß…ô pad…ôkuan mikur~…ĺi, katukuńß i ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺr~…ĺin a mińß ¶aan war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺa wuj-j…ô-na tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan a nu sinki ¶uan a sajdan. ***, . i tusip a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid mitabaku, saan mananam mitabaku tan…ôŇč mi ¶uduńß tu sakaj kawawan sa. kaput nida ¶i wi-r~…ĺian.fuor~…ĺi-s…ô na tuduan tu ¶i nida, nika ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô pakunida sa ¶aaj pit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu kamu nida, nikudan satu si im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu nu r~…ĺawaj a ŇčanaŇč. anu ńßidan u nakamuan ni fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô tu ¶ajwar~…ĺ-siwpi ¶ a mińß ¶aan atu ¶i fuo-r~…ĺi-s…ô, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu pitabakuan mańßida u nipisur~…ĺasur~…ĺaj sa. **** . ar~…ĺ…ôsan nida ku sakasikadan a sajdaŇčan ¶i fuo-r~…ĺan- ¶…ô. pu-r~…ĺun-ta-nuo, kanamuńßan nida ¶i siaw-duo.r~…ĺipu-s…ô atu ¶i ni- ¶aj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an. nikapatajan ni ni- ¶aj tu ¶ajsiw-s…ôps…ôp a mińß ¶aan, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô u ni ni- ¶aj sa ku ¶akaj…ôn tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an nida tu kawaw. nika i nikuda ¶aaj tu ka namuńß tu kawaw ni ni- ¶aj, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mi ¶udad tu sakaj sinki a ¶udadan, namańßida ńßina ¶udad ¶inida tu iŇčgu nu ¶udadan ni sas…ô-pija, nikańßida jadańß ku namaka ¶i sas…ô-pija a ¶udadan ku jadańßaj nu nikir~…ĺiman tu tatapaŇčan nu sakaj udipan a sapikinkiwan tu ¶udadan. . kasiŇčaŇčanan ** ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺpi ¶ a nipikur~…ĺitan tu z…ôaŇč-matin.sak…ô pisakamuan tu ¶udadan a wajwajan, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô i pikawawan nida a kitidaan idaw ku nipiinsa ¶uan nida tu wij…ôna Ē~ °- fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô a nar~…ĺumaan, ajdaaj nu fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô puow-ku…ôn. ** *** ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺr~…ĺin a mińß ¶aan ¶ajs…ôp a bur~…ĺad ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô tajda i pa-r~…ĺi pasajda ¶i z…ôaŇč-matin.sak…ô paajaawi kaku sa, sakamusa ¶inida tina kawawan, saan namaka udip tu pasajdan i nu sinki ¶uan mikinkiw idaw ku nikinkiwan tu kawawan sa. saka tusa a mińß ¶aan sa ¶a ¶aj satu ¶i nida mikinkiw, tawja pikinkiwan ni fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô tada ba Ē~ °k…ôt tu, ńßina s…ôpi, nika ńßinian nida namaka wamaan nida tu ¶awar~…ĺ- siwn…ôm a mińß ¶aan nikapatajan ni ama nida sisa ńßida satu mar~…ĺawa ¶u. nai tawjaaj tu a nikinkiwan, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô mi ¶uduńß tu tad…ômaw nu wawaan tu nisawa ¶uan, tu nikudan satu mar~…ĺa nipa ¶i ¶ian tunusinki ńß…ôni. tujnijan a mińß ¶aan miar~…ĺ…ôs ¶inida tu sakaj misajdan, i wi-j…ô-na misiwbaj tu pad…ôkuan. *****, . mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: Si-ke-mung-de.fuo-luo-yi-de (kamu nu Hulam: Ť•Ņś†ľŤíôŚĺ∑.šĹõśīõšľäŚĺ∑) nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ yumahidaśó©ŚĻī caywal-limnem mihcaan lima a bulad enem a demiad, pilacehan ni fuo-luo-yi-de itida i Aw-ti-li-ti-kuo-muo-la-wi-ya-Fuo-lay-paw a Yu-tay tademaw a lumaan, pilecuhan i Yu-tay a lumaan tu nikuda nipicudadan idaw ku satabakiay nu picuduhan. pilecuhan nina nida tulu ku tatamaan a wawaan atu lima ku tataynaan a wawaw, sakakaay nu tatamaan cinida, idaw hen ku caayay kalecad nu wamaan a wawaan. makelec ku nikaudip nu heni, adidi likecu ku luma', nika paicelan ku babalaki nu heni pahabay i tu nuhenian, micidek tu ci Fuo-luo-yi-dean. Nanuwawaw, micidek ku nipahabay tu tineng ci nidaan, tada micidek tu ku sapahabay ci nidaan mikikaka tu sapahabay tu calekakaan nida. 1856ŚĻī5śúą6śó•, . pilecuhan nida idaw ku mikabitay tu pilanuan tu udip nida, saan cina nida u malemeday ku mahiniay sa, yu wawa henay cinida mikikakatu tu salal a tineng, saiwaay henay ku mihcaan tada kapah tu ku nicudadan mikiayaw tu salal micudadtu tu cun-sea, picudadan tu waluay a mihcaan pinanaman matulin cinida enemay a mihcaan u sayaway a ku nipicudadan, micidek ku sakay laylayan tu udipan u sayaway tu makaala tu pitu a mihcaan ku tenes nida a kapah. . itawya amica idaw ku mihantayay nu Yu-tay a masakaputay, nika cinida i caywal-piclu mihcaan micumud tu Wi-ye-na tabakiay a cacudadan minanam tu nu nabakuan a kawawan. picudadan henay tu tabakiay a nipicuda Fuo-luo-yi-de, manamuh cinida tu sakay cilekayan atu sakay udipan a kawawan, sipayayaw nidaku sapinanam tu sakay aadupan atu sakay udipan a minanam, yadahtu ku nihapuan nida tu nicudadan. tawya u mikinkiway tu namakabalucuay a sayda nida ci Fuo-lan-ce. Pu-lun-ta-nuo, kasikadan nida kina babalaki. caywal-walcay a mihcaan lima a bulad, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de malaheci tu nida ku sakay misaydan a nipihedek micudad , maala nida ku Puo-se a nipicudadan. . hedek satu micudad, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de mitulin itini i Nsete'-pulike' a pikingkiwan tu sakay udipan misakakawaw. atu ci Masa.puonayse nikuda nu nipikungyakuan, mangalay micunus tu kalisiw, miala cinida tu nakamuan ni Puli-ke' alesen nida ku sapikingkiwan tu lilun a cudadan, malamisaydan cinida. caywal-waltu mihcaan pitu a bulad lucay a demiad, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de malingatu i Wiyena'-cunhe padekuan mikuli, katukuh i caywal-wallin a mihcaan walu a bulad mala Wuy-ye-na tabakiay nu cacudadan a nu sinkicuan a saydan. ÁēĘś•≠ŚĺĆ, . i tusip a mihcaan malalid mitabaku, saan mananam mitabaku taneng micuduh tu sakay kawawan sa. kaput nida ci Wi-lian.fuoli-se na tuduan tu ci nida, nika ci Fuo-luo-yi-de pakunida sa caay pitengil tu kamu nida, nikudan satu si imelang tu nu laway a nganang. anu hidan u nakamuan ni Fuo-luo-yi-de tu caywal-siwpic a mihcaan atu ci Fuo-li-se, malalid nu pitabakuan mahida u nipisulasulay sa. šĽĖŚú®24 . alesan nida ku sakasikadan a saydangan ci Fuo-lan-ce. Pu-lun-ta-nuo, kanamuhan nida ci Siaw-duo.Lipu-se atu ci Ni-cay a nisanga'an. nikapatayan ni Ni-cay tu caysiw-sepsep a mihcaan, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de u ni Ni-cay sa ku cakayen tu nisanga'an nida tu kawaw. nika i nikuda caay tu ka namuh tu kawaw ni Ni-cay, malingatu tu micudad tu sakay sinki a cudadan, namahida hina cudad cinida tu inggu nu cudadan ni Sase-piya, nikahida yadah ku namaka ci Sase-piya a cudadan ku yadahay nu nikiliman tu tatapangan nu sakay udipan a sapikinkiwan tu cudadan. . Kasinganganan śąźŚźć Caywal-walpic a nipikulitan tu Zeang-Matin.sake pisakamuan tu cudadan a waywayan, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de i pikawawan nida a kitidaan idaw ku nipiinsacuan nida tu Wiyena'- Fuo-luo-yi-de a nalumaan, aydaay nu Fuo-luo-yi-de puow-kuen. 30 537 Caywal-wallin a mihcaan caysep a bulad ci Fuo-luo-yi-de tayda i Pa-li pasayda ci Zeang-Matin.sake paayaawi kaku sa, sakamusa cinida tina kawawan, saan namaka udip tu pasaydan i nu sinkicuan mikinkiw idaw ku nikinkiwan tu kawawan sa. saka tusa a mihcaan sacacay satu ci nida mikinkiw, tawya pikinkiwan ni Fuo-luo-yi-de tada ba'ket tu, hina sepi, nika hinian nida namaka wamaan nida tu cawal- siwnem a mihcaan nikapatayan ni ama nida sisa hida satu malawacu. nai tawyaay tu a nikinkiwan, ci Fuo-luo-yi-de micuduh tu tademaw nu wawaan tu nisawacuan, tu nikudan satu mala nipacician tunusinkican atu kalaapaapaan a kawawan, u Fuo-luo-yi-de sapiala tu balucu han a cudadan. 1885ŚĻī10śúą, . caywal-walnem mihcaan, siacawa cinida ci Masa.-Puonay-se, a enem ku wawa nu heni. tuyniyan a mihcaan miales cinida tu sakay misaydan, i Wi-ye-na misiwbay tu padekuan. 1886ŚĻī, . malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

itida i aw-ti-r~…ĺi-ti-kuo-muo-r~…ĺa-wi-ja-fuo-r~…ĺaj-paw a ju-taj tad…ômaw a r~…ĺumaan, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ju-taj a r~…ĺumaan tu nikuda nipi ¶udadan idaw ku satabakiaj nu pi ¶uduńßan. pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nina nida tur~…ĺu ku tatamaan a wawaan atu r~…ĺima ku tatajnaan a wawaw, sakakaaj nu tatamaan ¶inida, idaw ńß…ôn ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu wamaan a wawaan. mak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ku nikaudip nu ńß…ôni, adidi ¶id…ôk tu ku sapańßabaj ¶i nidaan mikikaka tu sapańßabaj tu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan nida. *********, . pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida idaw ku mikabitaj tu pir~…ĺanuan tu udip nida, saan ¶ina nida u mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ku mańßiniaj sa, ju wawa ńß…ônaj ¶inida mikikakatu tu sar~…ĺar~…ĺ a tin…ôŇč, saiwaaj ńß…ônaj ku mińß ¶aan tada kapańß tu ku ni ¶udadan mikiajaw tu sar~…ĺar~…ĺ mi ¶udadtu tu ¶un-s…ôa, pi ¶udadan tu war~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan pinanaman matur~…ĺin ¶inida …ôn…ômaj a mińß ¶aan u sajawaj a ku nipi ¶udadan, mi ¶id…ôk ku sakaj r~…ĺajr~…ĺajan tu udipan u sajawaj tu makaar~…ĺa tu pitu a mińß ¶aan ku t…ôn…ôs nida a kapańß. . itawja ami ¶a idaw ku mińßantajaj nu ju-taj a masakaputaj, nika ¶inida i ¶ajwar~…ĺ-pi ¶r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud tu wi-j…ô-na tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu nu nabakuan a kawawan. pi ¶udadan ńß…ônaj tu tabakiaj a nipi ¶uda fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô, manamuńß ¶inida tu sakaj ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan atu sakaj udipan a kawawan, sipajajaw nidaku sapinanam tu sakaj aadupan atu sakaj udipan a minanam, jadańßtu ku nińßapuan nida tu ni ¶udadan. tawja u mikinkiwaj tu namakabar~…ĺu ¶uaj a sajda nida ¶i fuo-r~…ĺan- ¶…ô. pu-r~…ĺun-ta-nuo, kasikadan nida kina babar~…ĺaki. ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺ ¶aj a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu nida ku sakaj misajdan a nipińß…ôd…ôk mi ¶udad , maar~…ĺa nida ku puo-s…ô a nipi ¶udadan. . ńß…ôd…ôk satu mi ¶udad, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô mitur~…ĺin itini i ns…ôt…ô Ē~ °-pur~…ĺik…ô Ē~ ° a pikiŇčkiwan tu sakaj udipan misakakawaw. atu ¶i masa.puonajs…ô nikuda nu nipikuŇčjakuan, maŇčar~…ĺaj mi ¶unus tu kar~…ĺisiw, miar~…ĺa ¶inida tu nakamuan ni pur~…ĺi-k…ô Ē~ ° ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn nida ku sapikiŇčkiwan tu r~…ĺir~…ĺun a ¶udadan, mar~…ĺamisajdan ¶inida. ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺtu mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad r~…ĺu ¶aj a d…ômiad, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu i wij…ôna Ē~ °- ¶unńß…ô pad…ôkuan mikur~…ĺi, katukuńß i ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺr~…ĺin a mińß ¶aan war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺa wuj-j…ô-na tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan a nu sinki ¶uan a sajdan. ***, . i tusip a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid mitabaku, saan mananam mitabaku tan…ôŇč mi ¶uduńß tu sakaj kawawan sa. kaput nida ¶i wi-r~…ĺian.fuor~…ĺi-s…ô na tuduan tu ¶i nida, nika ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô pakunida sa ¶aaj pit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu kamu nida, nikudan satu si im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu nu r~…ĺawaj a ŇčanaŇč. anu ńßidan u nakamuan ni fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô tu ¶ajwar~…ĺ-siwpi ¶ a mińß ¶aan atu ¶i fuo-r~…ĺi-s…ô, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu pitabakuan mańßida u nipisur~…ĺasur~…ĺaj sa. **** . ar~…ĺ…ôsan nida ku sakasikadan a sajdaŇčan ¶i fuo-r~…ĺan- ¶…ô. pu-r~…ĺun-ta-nuo, kanamuńßan nida ¶i siaw-duo.r~…ĺipu-s…ô atu ¶i ni- ¶aj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an. nikapatajan ni ni- ¶aj tu ¶ajsiw-s…ôps…ôp a mińß ¶aan, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô u ni ni- ¶aj sa ku ¶akaj…ôn tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an nida tu kawaw. nika i nikuda ¶aaj tu ka namuńß tu kawaw ni ni- ¶aj, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mi ¶udad tu sakaj sinki a ¶udadan, namańßida ńßina ¶udad ¶inida tu iŇčgu nu ¶udadan ni sas…ô-pija, nikańßida jadańß ku namaka ¶i sas…ô-pija a ¶udadan ku jadańßaj nu nikir~…ĺiman tu tatapaŇčan nu sakaj udipan a sapikinkiwan tu ¶udadan. . kasiŇčaŇčanan ** ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺpi ¶ a nipikur~…ĺitan tu z…ôaŇč-matin.sak…ô pisakamuan tu ¶udadan a wajwajan, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô i pikawawan nida a kitidaan idaw ku nipiinsa ¶uan nida tu wij…ôna Ē~ °- fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô a nar~…ĺumaan, ajdaaj nu fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô puow-ku…ôn. ** *** ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺr~…ĺin a mińß ¶aan ¶ajs…ôp a bur~…ĺad ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô tajda i pa-r~…ĺi pasajda ¶i z…ôaŇč-matin.sak…ô paajaawi kaku sa, sakamusa ¶inida tina kawawan, saan namaka udip tu pasajdan i nu sinki ¶uan mikinkiw idaw ku nikinkiwan tu kawawan sa. saka tusa a mińß ¶aan sa ¶a ¶aj satu ¶i nida mikinkiw, tawja pikinkiwan ni fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô tada ba Ē~ °k…ôt tu, ńßina s…ôpi, nika ńßinian nida namaka wamaan nida tu ¶awar~…ĺ- siwn…ôm a mińß ¶aan nikapatajan ni ama nida sisa ńßida satu mar~…ĺawa ¶u. nai tawjaaj tu a nikinkiwan, ¶i fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô mi ¶uduńß tu tad…ômaw nu wawaan tu nisawa ¶uan, tu nikudan satu mar~…ĺa nipa ¶i ¶ian tunusinki ¶an atu kar~…ĺaapaapaan a kawawan, u fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô sapiar~…ĺa tu bar~…ĺu ¶u ńßan a ¶udadan. ********, . ¶ajwar~…ĺ-war~…ĺn…ôm mińß ¶aan, sia ¶awa ¶inida ¶i masa.-puonaj-s…ô, a …ôn…ôm ku wawa nu ńß…ôni. tujnijan a mińß ¶aan miar~…ĺ…ôs ¶inida tu sakaj misajdan, i wi-j…ô-na misiwbaj tu pad…ôkuan. *****, . mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
